text.title: wcag-22-compliance Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for wcag-22-compliance as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: LLM assumes "accessible" means "alt text added"; 2.2 is mostly about interaction quality.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Accessibility spans semantic structure, keyboard navigation, focus management, cognitive load, color contrast, and more. Alt text is one small piece.

failure-mode.description: Agent misses focus-indicator regressions caused by `outline: none` in design tokens.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Linting for `outline: none` without a paired custom focus indicator is essential; agents often remove outlines and forget to add custom styles.

failure-mode.description: `aria-hidden` and `inert` get over-applied; agent must verify keyboard reachability after applying.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: These attributes hide content from assistive tech; over-applying them removes keyboard access to interactive elements.

failure-mode.description: Color-contrast checks fail on gradients and images-of-text — agent reads CSS only.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pixel-level sampling is needed for gradient contrast; CSS reads cannot infer rendered colors. Images-of-text need OCR + contrast analysis.

failure-mode.description: Target-size SC: agent does not include the spacing exception; over-reports icon buttons.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The SC allows spacing around the target; if 24x24 includes padding, it passes. Agents must read the full SC text.

failure-mode.description: Agent ships an "overlay/widget" as a fix.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Never let an agent ship an overlay or JavaScript "accessibility tool" as a fix — they usually make things worse. Flag and refuse.
